title: Learnings ledger (machine-readable sidecar)
description: Schema for learnings.json — the machine-readable sidecar for LEARNINGS.md. Top-level shape is an object { "entries": [ <entry>, ... ] }; validate_run.py ALSO accepts a bare top-level array of entries (that tolerance lives in the loader, not the schema). Each entry is schema-validated in validate_run.py against $defs.entry; a malformed entry is REPORTED (rep.fail) and DROPPED so it can never reach the I12 since_wave propagation comparison. Emitted in Phase 6 when a generalizable lesson is admitted (NOT seeded at bootstrap). Canonical field set incl. since_wave (int>=1, the wave from which the entry binds later briefs): id, trigger, lesson, how_to_apply, scope{applies_to,excludes,expiry}, evidence, since_wave; promotable optional.

id.description: LEARNINGS entry id, e.g. L1, L2 (run/project-scoped) or G1, G2 (global-scoped). Referenced from brief.learnings_applied.

trigger.description: The situation/signal that surfaced the lesson (what went wrong or was observed).

how_to_apply.description: Concrete guidance for applying the lesson in a later unit.

scope.description: Where the lesson binds. applies_to selectors (e.g. 'tag:core') drive the tag-scoped propagation predicate in validate_run.py.

model.description: Optional: the model (run's model) this lesson is scoped to. Absent => model-agnostic.

evidence.description: Evidence grounding the lesson (a reference, quote, or observed outcome).

since_wave.description: The wave from which this entry binds later briefs; the propagation predicate is U.wave >= since_wave.

promotable.description: Optional: whether the lesson is a candidate for promotion to a durable rule.

last_applied_run.description: Optional (decay): run_label of the most recent run in which this lesson was applied.

applied_count.description: Optional (decay): number of times this lesson has been applied across runs.

last_confirmed.description: Optional (decay): run_label of the most recent run in which this lesson was confirmed still valid.

max_idle_runs.description: Optional (decay): number of consecutive runs the lesson may go unapplied before it is a decay candidate.

supersedes.description: Optional: id of an earlier learnings entry this entry replaces.
